disambiguated.context: In group therapy, two people opened up today about having grown up in really tight knit communities. One of them was a Catholic man and the other a Hindu man. The Catholic man mentioned a news story that had come to light recently about his old religious leader having molested a number of boys, and revealed that even though he never publicly came forward, the same had happened to him. The Hindu man, though, had very fond memories around his community and the religious leader he talked to a lot, and talked about how they're still in close contact.
disambiguated.question: Who had a good relationship with his religious leader?
